name: Entropy Link
additional_info: You are able to fast travel to certain places while resting at a campfire. Locations are unlocked by interacting with special meteorites that are scattered around the map. By sitting at a campfire and typing out the name of the desired meteorite, you will be transported directly to it.
desc: The world is broken, linked by fragile webs. Traverse the path by stating your destination amidst the flame.
